packageRules.description: Hold object_store at 0.13.x. DataFusion 53 pins object_store ^0.13, and ourios-querier hands ourios-parquet's Store::object_store() to DataFusion's register_object_store (RFC 0013 §2.2), so the two crates must share one object_store version. Bumping to 0.14 splits the Arc<dyn ObjectStore> type at that boundary and breaks the build. Lift this together with a DataFusion upgrade (which also gates the thrift advisory, #295).
